title: AddDocumentModal
description: Modal that uploads one-or-more files of a chosen document type to a shipment workflow.

open.description: Whether the modal is visible. Bind to a state slot.

swaId.description: Shipment Workflow Activity ID. Required for the real attach call. Bind to {{datasource.shipment.swa_id}}.

existingDocumentKeys.description: Already-uploaded document_key values for this shipment — filtered out of the dropdown.

apiMode.description: `mock` returns canned options + simulates upload; `real` proxies to gocomet's library + workflow APIs.

mockDelayMs.description: Mock-only — artificial latency for each network hop.

milestoneId.description: milestone_id sent on the attach call.

checklistId.description: checklist_id sent on the attach call.

source.description: Tag identifying where the upload originated (`table` | `details` | etc.).

acceptedFileTypes.description: Comma-separated extensions passed to the file input's accept attribute.

allowMultiple.description: Whether the user can attach more than one file in a single submission.
